title: Lent.
content:
"Oh lend me five," the young man cried,
        "My money all is spent."
     The maiden shook her head and sighed,
        "I'm sorry but it's Lent."
meaning:
"Lent." is a quintessential example of Edwin C. Ranck's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
